evals.prompt: Turn this approved plan into a v1 planner handoff with status ready, task_id, validation commands, and a next action the executor can start immediately.
evals.expected_behavior: Uses the planner-handoff v1 template shape with required frontmatter (contract_type, contract_version, created_by, status) and concrete next action rather than freeform chat prose.
assertions: Selects a planner handoff or planning-phase contract rather than inventing a new shape
Requires or fills contract_version v1 and shared frontmatter keys
Makes status and next action explicit instead of burying them in prose

evals.prompt: Rewrite these review notes into a review-outcome contract with status revise, accepted comments, and unresolved items.
evals.expected_behavior: Maps notes into the review-outcome contract with an explicit approve|revise|blocked-style status and structured review fields.
assertions: Uses a review-outcome contract or equivalent review artifact
Makes the decision status explicit (for example revise)
Keeps accepted versus unresolved comments distinguishable

evals.prompt: Write a product requirements document for this feature before we create tickets.
evals.expected_behavior: Routes away from workflow-contracts because the task is PRD authoring, not a durable plan/review/execution handoff.
assertions: Does not force a workflow-contract template for PRD authoring
Routes toward to-prd or product-requirements work instead of inventing a handoff contract
